actor_pool_malloc.description: Actor allocation with malloc/free per operation

actor_ring.description: Ring benchmark: N actors passing messages in a circle

hashmap_ops.description: HashMap operations with uniform random keys

optimizations.actor_pool: Reuses retired actor structs to avoid malloc/free churn for actor alloc/dealloc cycles
optimizations.lockfree_mailbox: Atomic ring buffer replacing mutex-guarded mailbox — wins scale with producer-side contention
optimizations.adaptive_batching: Dynamic batch size 4-64 based on throughput

notes: Actor Pool avoids the malloc/free path for actor lifecycle churn
Lock-free mailbox shows its benefit under multi-producer contention, not single-producer
Adaptive batching shines with variable workloads
SIMD helps vectorizable batch operations; non-SIMD paths fall back to scalar
Dedup trades some per-message overhead for semantic correctness
Run benchmark-optimizations target for latest numbers on your host
